It uses `tslib` helpers for compatibility and includes a source map comment, which is standard for transpiled code.\n\n---\n\n### Review of Reports:\n\n**Reports 1-5** all describe the code as a simple module re-export pattern, with no suspicious activity, no data handling, no external network calls, and no malicious intent.
